text.title: EU AI Act Compliance — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `eu-ai-act-compliance`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: scope-the-system
step.input: AI system inventory row + intended-use statement.
step.action: Extract: primary purpose, EU-deployment scope, user population, GPAI status.
step.output: Scoped system record with deployment_region + intended_use populated.

step.name: classify-risk-tier
step.action: Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml; assign one of prohibited / high-risk / limited-risk / minimal-risk / gpai / gpai-systemic.

step.name: cite-article-obligations
step.action: Look up the Article checklist for this tier; produce article_citations list and obligations table.
step.output: obligations[] array with article, obligation, owner, deadline.

step.name: gap-analyse-evidence
step.action: For every obligation check if evidence (doc, code, audit log) exists; record gaps with evidence_missing.

step.name: document-and-store
step.action: Fill conformity-self-assessment.md or technical-doc-article11.md; commit to compliance repo.

step.name: legal-review-handoff
step.action: Hand grey-zone classifications to legal counsel; require sign-off before publication.
step.output: Counsel sign-off recorded in commit message.
